de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions

Class KeyAction

  • java.lang.Object
    • javax.swing.AbstractAction
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.KeyAction
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.event.ActionListener, java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, java.util.EventListener, javax.swing.Action
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    EditSourceFileAction, MainWindowAction, ProofTreePopupFactory.ProofTreeAction, ShowInteractiveBranchesAction, ToggleExplorationAction

    public abstract class KeyAction
extends javax.swing.AbstractAction
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Field Detail

      • SHORTCUT_FOCUSED_CONDITION

        public static final java.lang.String SHORTCUT_FOCUSED_CONDITION
        SHORTCUT_FOCUSED_CONDITION
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PRIORITY

        public static final java.lang.String PRIORITY
        Additional key for Actions. Describes the priority, and therefor an order to arrange these actions.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PATH

        public static final java.lang.String PATH
        Additional key for Actions. Describes a path in a menu where an action should be injected in.

        The path should be a dot-separated string, i.e. "Heatmap.Options" would inject an action into a sub-sub Menu Options below Heatmap.

        See Also:
        KeYGuiExtensionFacade.findMenu(JMenu, Iterator), Constant Field Values

      • CHECKBOX

        public static final java.lang.String CHECKBOX
        Boolean property set to true if the this action should be displayed with a checkbox.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • LOCAL_ACCELERATOR

        public static final java.lang.String LOCAL_ACCELERATOR
        Key for defining local shortcuts which are prefered used by KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts. In comparision with ACCELERATOR_KEY which should be used for global shortcuts.

        The stored values are KeyStroke.

        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SHORTCUT_KEY_MASK

        protected static final int SHORTCUT_KEY_MASK
        See Also:
        KeyStrokeManager.SHORTCUT_KEY_MASK
